evals.description: Directly invoking /absolute-simplify should activate the skill with banner
Asking to clean up changes should trigger simplification
evals.prompt: Clean up my changes before I commit

evals.description: Pointing at a specific file should set that as scope
Requesting a new feature should NOT trigger simplification
evals.prompt: Add a login page with email and password fields

evals.description: Requesting a bug fix should NOT trigger simplification since it changes behavior
evals.prompt: Fix the crash that happens when the user submits an empty form on line 42

evals.description: Should check staged files first, then unstaged, never default to entire repo
evals.prompt: How does absolute-simplify determine what code to simplify?

evals.description: Should read project configuration before making changes
evals.prompt: What does absolute-simplify check before simplifying code?

evals.description: Must emphasize preserving functionality as a hard gate
evals.prompt: Can absolute-simplify change the return value of a function to make it cleaner?

evals.description: Should always replace nested ternaries, never leave them
evals.prompt: I have a nested ternary like status === 'a' ? 'A' : status === 'b' ? 'B' : 'C'. Should absolute-simplify keep it?

evals.description: Should attempt to detect and run test commands after simplification
evals.prompt: Does absolute-simplify verify that changes did not break anything?

evals.description: When no git changes exist and no target specified, should ask user not simplify whole repo
evals.prompt: What happens if I run /absolute-simplify but I have no staged or unstaged changes?

evals.description: Should apply extra caution when simplifying test files
evals.prompt: Should absolute-simplify simplify my test files the same way as production code?

evals.description: Should re-stage files that were staged before simplification
evals.prompt: If I have files staged for commit and run absolute-simplify, will they still be staged after?

evals.description: Should not introduce new dependencies or imports not already in the project
evals.prompt: Can absolute-simplify add lodash to replace manual array operations?

evals.description: When simplifying Python files, should use Python-specific patterns
evals.prompt: I have a Python file that uses os.path.join everywhere. What would absolute-simplify do?
